title: Positive Flow - Calculate Waist to Height Ratio
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Waist to Height Ratio screen.
test_data: Age: 26 | Gender: Female | Height: 6 feet | Waist: 0 cm
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Waist to Height Ratio screen. | Enter the age as 26. | Select the gender as Female. | Enter the height as 6 feet. | Enter the waist measurement as 0 cm. | Click on the 'WAIST TO HEIGHT RATIO' button.
expected_result: The 'Waist to Height Ratio' and 'Ideal Waist' fields should be populated with the calculated values.

title: Negative Flow - Invalid Waist Measurement
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Waist to Height Ratio screen.
test_data: Age: 26 | Gender: Female | Height: 6 feet | Waist: -1 cm
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Waist to Height Ratio screen. | Enter the age as 26. | Select the gender as Female. | Enter the height as 6 feet. | Enter the waist measurement as -1 cm. | Click on the 'WAIST TO HEIGHT RATIO' button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the waist measurement cannot be negative.

title: Toggle State - Classification Section
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Waist to Height Ratio screen.
test_data: Age: 26 | Gender: Female | Height: 6 feet | Waist: 0 cm
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Waist to Height Ratio screen. | Enter the age as 26. | Select the gender as Female. | Enter the height as 6 feet. | Enter the waist measurement as 0 cm. | Click on the 'WAIST TO HEIGHT RATIO' button. | Click on the 'UnderWeight' classification. | Click on the 'Normal' classification. | Click on the 'OverWeight' classification. | Click on the 'Obese' classification. | Click on the 'Morbidly Obese' classification.
expected_result: The classification section should display the selected weight classifications.
